vulnerabilities.name: SQL Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: The application is vulnerable to SQL injection attacks. Attackers can bypass authentication and extract database contents.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Use parameterized queries/prepared statements with input validation.

vulnerabilities.name: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)
vulnerabilities.description: Reflected XSS vulnerability detected. Attackers can inject malicious scripts.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Implement output encoding and Content Security Policy (CSP).

vulnerabilities.name: Missing Security Headers
vulnerabilities.description: Important security headers like X-Frame-Options and CSP are missing.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Add security headers to server configuration.

vulnerabilities.name: Command Injection
vulnerabilities.description: Command injection vulnerability detected. Attackers can execute system commands.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Avoid system calls, use input validation and allowlists.

fixes.one_click_fix: Apply prepared statements to all database queries

fixes.fix_code:
# Apache .htaccess:
Header set X-Frame-Options "DENY"
Header set X-Content-Type-Options "nosniff"
Header set X-XSS-Protection "1; mode=block"
